sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ عِيدُ الفِطْرِ مُنَاسَبَةً دِينِيَّةً وَاجْتِمَاعِيَّةً مُمَيَّزَةً تَغْمُرُ البُلْدَانَ العَرَبِيَّةَ بِأَجْوَاءٍ مِنَ الفَرَحِ وَالسُّرُورِ.
sentences.translation: Ramazanski bajram se smatra posebnom vjerskom i društvenom prigodom koja arapske zemlje preplavljuje atmosferom radosti i veselja.
sentences.translationEn: Eid al-Fitr is considered a special religious and social occasion that floods Arab countries with an atmosphere of joy and happiness.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الِاحْتِفَالَاتُ بِأَدَاءِ صَلَاةِ العِيدِ فِي السَّاحَاتِ العَامَّةِ، حَيْثُ يَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ بِعِبَارَاتِ "عِيدُكُمْ مُبَارَكٌ".
sentences.translation: Proslave počinju obavljanjem bajram-namaza na javnim trgovima, gdje ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke riječima "Eidkum Mubarak".
sentences.translationEn: Celebrations begin with the performance of the Eid prayer in public squares, where people exchange greetings with the phrase 'Eidkum Mubarak.'

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَدِي العَائِلَاتُ أَجْمَلَ المَلَابِسِ الجَدِيدَةِ، وَيُسَارِعُ الأَطْفَالُ لِتَلَقِّي "العِيدِيَّةِ" الَّتِي تَبْعَثُ فِي نُفُوسِهِمْ بَهْجَةً لَا تُوصَفُ.
sentences.translation: Porodice oblače najljepšu novu odjeću, a djeca žure da prime "eidiju" (bajramluk) koja u njihove duše unosi neopisivu radost.
sentences.translationEn: Families wear their most beautiful new clothes, and children rush to receive 'Eidiya' (monetary gift) which brings indescribable joy to their souls.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ البُيُوتُ بِرَائِحَةِ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ مِثْلِ المَعْمُولِ وَالغُرَيْبَةِ الَّتِي تُقَدَّمُ لِلزَّائِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Kuće se pune mirisom tradicionalnih kolača poput ma'mula i gurabija koji se poslužuju posjetiocima.
sentences.translationEn: Houses are filled with the scent of traditional sweets such as Ma'amoul and Ghraybeh, which are served to visitors.

sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ هَذِهِ الأَيَّامُ فُرْصَةً ثَمِينَةً لِصِلَةِ الرَّحِمِ وَتَصْفِيَةِ القُلُوبِ وَتَجْدِيدِ العُهُودِ بَيْنَ الأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi dani predstavljaju dragocjenu priliku za održavanje rodbinskih veza, pročišćenje srca i obnavljanje zavjeta među prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: These days represent a precious opportunity for visiting kin, purifying hearts, and renewing bonds among friends.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ رُوحَ التَّكَافُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ تَبْرُزُ بِجَلَاءٍ مِنْ خِلَالِ تَوْزِيعِ الصَّدَقَاتِ عَلَى المُحْتَاجِينَ لِضَمَانِ سَعَادَةِ الجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Duh društvene solidarnosti jasno se ističe kroz podjelu sadake (milostinje) potrebnima kako bi se osigurala sreća svima.
sentences.translationEn: The spirit of social solidarity stands out clearly through the distribution of charity to the needy to ensure everyone's happiness.
